item.title: We've Been Eating This Without Knowing for Millions of Years #EyeOpening #Health #Shorts
item.description: Disturbing findings in our food chain reveal fish caught that have been undetected for millions of years, hinting at a shared fundamental trait across diverse animal life. This video explores the mystery of these "living fossils," including the elusive coelacanth, and poses questions about what other ancient creatures might still be lurking. What other prehistoric creatures have we missed in the depths?
